title: Laptop backpack
description: Durable 30L travel backpack made from water-resistant 600D polyester. Features a padded compartment for laptops up to 15.6 inches. Dimensions: 18 x 12 x 8 inches. Ideal for daily commuting or weekend travel.
merchant_intent: Sell a high-quality, durable travel and commute backpack for young professionals.

title: Shirt
merchant_intent: Sell premium cotton formal shirts for corporate professionals

title: Women's running shoes
description: Lightweight women's running shoes crafted with a breathable mesh upper for maximum ventilation. Available in sizes EU 36-42. Features responsive cushioning and weighs only 220g per shoe. Perfect for marathons or daily jogging.
merchant_intent: Sell performance running shoes to serious female athletes.

title: Face Cream
merchant_intent: Sell an SPF 50 daily moisturizer specifically formulated for dry skin

title: Black Steel Water Bottle
description: This beautiful silver aluminum bottle is lightweight and easy to carry. It's perfect for the gym or office.
merchant_intent: Sell a sleek, double-walled insulated stainless steel black water bottle.

title: Headphones
description: Experience audio perfection with our hyper-adaptive acoustic mesh. The integrated quantum noise vector cancels out background noise, while the sub-assembly transducer array and capacitive spectrum filter ensure unparalleled fidelity.
merchant_intent: Sell noise-cancelling over-ear wireless headphones to audiophiles.

title: Smart Fitness Watch
description: Advanced smart fitness watch featuring a 24/7 continuous heart rate monitor and built-in GPS for accurate tracking. 50m water resistance makes it swim-proof. Compatible with iOS and Android devices. Enjoy up to 7 days of battery life on a single charge.
merchant_intent: Sell a reliable, feature-packed smartwatch for fitness tracking.

title: Blocks
merchant_intent: Sell premium wooden building blocks for children aged 3-8

title: Premium Yoga Mat
description: Eco-friendly premium yoga mat made from non-slip natural rubber. Exact dimensions: 183cm x 61cm with a plush 6mm thickness for joint support. Includes a convenient carrying strap for easy transport.
merchant_intent: Sell high-end, supportive yoga mats to yoga enthusiasts.

title: Watch
description: Nice watch. Looks good. Buy now.
merchant_intent: Sell a luxury mechanical analog wristwatch.
